project.name: tokiwagi
project.description: Ứng dụng Next.js full-stack quản lý đặt phòng/vé cho các cơ sở (tenant), tích hợp thanh toán GMO, tích hợp POS Smaregi, và bảng điều khiển admin để quản lý tenant, vé, nhân viên, tin tức và cài đặt hệ thống.

nodes.name: Booking & Reservation Management
nodes.summary: Handles the end-to-end lifecycle of facility bookings: online and offline reservation creation, monthly/times-limit ticket purchases, booking history management, cancellation, and queue/vacancy tracking. This is the core business domain of the app around which tenants, tickets, and users revolve.

businessRules: A booking must reference a valid ticket and tenant with available vacancy
Monthly and times-limit tickets cannot be double-booked/used across tenants beyond their limit
Cancelled or expired bookings free up vacancy slots and trigger reminder/cron jobs
crossDomainInteractions: Booking check-in/out is performed via POS/Smaregi scanning

nodes.name: Create Online Booking
nodes.summary: User selects a tenant, ticket, and date, fills quantity/age info, agrees to disclaimers, pays via GMO/credit card, and receives a booking confirmation.

nodes.name: Select Tenant Ticket Date
nodes.summary: User selects tenant, ticket type, and booking date in the online booking form.

nodes.name: Enter Quantity Ages
nodes.summary: User enters the number of adults/children and their ages for the booking.

nodes.name: Accept Disclaimer Terms
nodes.summary: User reviews and accepts facility disclaimer terms required before booking.

nodes.name: Enter Credit Card
nodes.summary: User enters or selects a saved credit card for online payment.

nodes.name: Submit Booking Request
nodes.summary: Booking request is submitted to the user bookings API for creation.

nodes.name: Process Gmo Payment
nodes.summary: GMO payment gateway authorizes and captures the online payment for the booking.

nodes.name: Show Booking Confirmation
nodes.summary: System displays a confirmation screen summarizing the completed booking.

nodes.name: Show Booking Completion
nodes.summary: Booking completion page is shown, finalizing the online booking flow.

nodes.name: Create Offline/Admin Booking
nodes.summary: Admin or facility staff creates a booking on behalf of a walk-in customer, selecting ticket type, calculating price, and confirming payment offline.

nodes.name: Open Offline Booking Form
nodes.summary: Staff opens the offline booking form to start a walk-in booking.

nodes.name: Select Ticket Plan Type
nodes.summary: Staff selects the ticket plan type such as monthly or times-limit ticket.

nodes.name: Enter Booking Quantities
nodes.summary: Staff enters adult/child quantities and ages for the walk-in booking.

nodes.name: Calculate Total Price
nodes.summary: System calculates total booking price including discounts for the offline booking.

nodes.name: Confirm Offline Booking
nodes.summary: Staff reviews and confirms the offline booking details before submission.

nodes.name: Submit Offline Booking
nodes.summary: Offline booking is submitted and persisted via the admin bookings API.

nodes.name: Persist Booking Record
nodes.summary: Booking record is persisted with computed fields via server booking utilities.

nodes.name: Manage Booking History
nodes.summary: User views their past and upcoming bookings, inspects details, updates booking information, or cancels an existing booking.

nodes.name: List Booking History
nodes.summary: User views a paginated list of their booking history.

nodes.name: View Booking Detail
nodes.summary: User views full details of a specific booking by ID.

nodes.name: Update Booking Info
nodes.summary: User updates editable information on an existing booking.

nodes.name: Cancel Booking
nodes.summary: User cancels a booking through the cancel bookings API.

nodes.name: Show Cancel Success
nodes.summary: System confirms successful cancellation of the booking to the user.

nodes.name: Booking Queue & Vacancy Tracking
nodes.summary: Admin monitors and manages the live booking queue (waiting/calling/cancelled) and facility vacancy status, with cron jobs auto-expiring overdue queue entries.

nodes.name: View Booking Queue
nodes.summary: Admin views the current booking queue dashboard.

nodes.name: Fetch Waiting Bookings
nodes.summary: System fetches bookings currently in waiting status in the queue.

nodes.name: Call Next Booking
nodes.summary: Admin calls the next waiting booking to proceed with check-in.

nodes.name: Auto Cancel Overdue
nodes.summary: System automatically cancels bookings that overstayed in the queue without response.

nodes.name: View Vacancy Status
nodes.summary: Admin views current facility vacancy status derived from active bookings.

nodes.name: Cron Process Overdue Queue
nodes.summary: Scheduled cron job processes and expires overdue calling-status bookings.

nodes.name: Purchase Monthly/Times-Limit Ticket Plans
nodes.summary: User browses and purchases recurring ticket plans (monthly pass or times-limit pass) that entitle multiple future bookings under usage constraints.

nodes.name: Browse Monthly Ticket Page
nodes.summary: User browses the monthly ticket purchase landing page.

nodes.name: Browse Times Limit Ticket Page
nodes.summary: User browses the times-limit ticket purchase landing page.

nodes.name: Fill Monthly Booking Form
nodes.summary: User fills the monthly booking form to configure the ticket plan purchase.

nodes.name: Check Monthly Ticket Usage
nodes.summary: System checks whether the monthly ticket was already used across other tenants before allowing purchase.

nodes.name: Show Monthly Completion
nodes.summary: System shows the monthly ticket booking completion confirmation.

nodes.name: User Account & Authentication
nodes.summary: Manages end-user identity: signup with email verification, sign-in/sign-out via NextAuth, password recovery and account unlock, and self-service management of personal information, credit cards, and favorite tenants.

businessRules: Email must be verified before an account is fully active
Repeated failed logins can lock an account, requiring an unlock request/token
Password reset and email change require a valid time-limited token
crossDomainInteractions: Feeds authenticated identity into Booking & Reservation Management
Admin accounts are provisioned/managed by Admin Facility Management

nodes.name: User Signup & Email Verification
nodes.summary: New user registers an account, the system checks for duplicate email, creates the account, and sends a verification email that the user must confirm.

nodes.name: Fill Signup Form
nodes.summary: User fills out the signup form with personal and account details.

nodes.name: Check Existing Email
nodes.summary: System checks whether the entered email is already registered.

nodes.name: Create Account
nodes.summary: New user account is created via the signup API.

nodes.name: Send Verification Email
nodes.summary: System sends an email verification link to the new user.

nodes.name: Verify Email Token
nodes.summary: User confirms their email by visiting the verification token link.

nodes.name: Show Signup Success
nodes.summary: System shows the signup success confirmation page.

nodes.name: Login & Password Recovery
nodes.summary: User signs in through NextAuth credentials, or recovers access via forgot-password, reset-password, and account unlock flows when locked out.

nodes.name: Submit Signin Credentials
nodes.summary: User submits email/password credentials on the sign-in page.

nodes.name: Authenticate Nextauth
nodes.summary: NextAuth verifies credentials and establishes a session.

nodes.name: Request Password Reset
nodes.summary: User requests a password reset link via forgot-password.

nodes.name: Reset Password With Token
nodes.summary: User sets a new password using the emailed reset token.

nodes.name: Request Unlock Account
nodes.summary: Locked-out user requests an account unlock email after failed login attempts.

nodes.name: Unlock Account Token
nodes.summary: User unlocks their account by confirming the unlock token link.

nodes.name: Manage Personal Info & Preferences
nodes.summary: Authenticated user manages their profile: personal details, email/password changes, saved credit cards, favorite tenants, and account deletion.

nodes.name: View Personal Info
nodes.summary: User views their personal information page.

nodes.name: Update Personal Info
nodes.summary: User updates their personal profile information.

nodes.name: Change Email
nodes.summary: User changes their account email, triggering a re-verification step.

nodes.name: Change Password
nodes.summary: User changes their account password from personal info settings.

nodes.name: Manage Credit Cards
nodes.summary: User views and manages their saved credit cards.

nodes.name: Manage Favorite Tenants
nodes.summary: User views and manages their list of favorite facility tenants.

nodes.name: Delete Account
nodes.summary: User deletes their account after confirming the warning dialog.

nodes.name: Admin Facility & Content Management
nodes.summary: Back-office administration for facility operators: managing tenants (facilities), tickets/plans, staff accounts, news announcements, disclaimers, and app/email settings through an admin dashboard.

businessRules: Only authenticated admin/staff accounts can access management screens
Tenants must be configured before tickets can be created against them
Ticket booking schedules define when a ticket can be booked
crossDomainInteractions: Configures GMO settings consumed by Payment & Billing
Configures ticket/tenant data consumed by POS Check-in & Ticketing
Manages staff accounts alongside User Account & Authentication

nodes.name: Tenant (Facility) Management
nodes.summary: Admin creates, views, edits, and lists facility tenants that host bookable tickets.

nodes.name: List Tenants
nodes.summary: Admin views the list of registered tenants.

nodes.name: Create Tenant
nodes.summary: Admin creates a new facility tenant record.

nodes.name: Edit Tenant
nodes.summary: Admin edits an existing tenant's configuration.

nodes.name: View Tenant Detail
nodes.summary: Admin views full details of a specific tenant.

nodes.name: Persist Tenant
nodes.summary: Tenant data is persisted via the admin tenants API.

nodes.name: Ticket (Plan) Management
nodes.summary: Admin manages bookable ticket plans per tenant, including pricing/discount settings and their booking schedules.

nodes.name: List Tickets
nodes.summary: Admin views the list of ticket plans.

nodes.name: Create Ticket
nodes.summary: Admin creates a new ticket plan.

nodes.name: Edit Ticket
nodes.summary: Admin edits an existing ticket plan's configuration.

nodes.name: Configure Booking Schedules
nodes.summary: Admin configures the ticket's booking schedule windows.

nodes.name: Persist Ticket
nodes.summary: Ticket plan data is persisted via the admin tickets API.

nodes.name: Staff Account Management
nodes.summary: Admin manages staff accounts that operate the admin dashboard and POS scanning tools.

nodes.name: List Staff
nodes.summary: Admin views the list of staff accounts.

nodes.name: Create Staff
nodes.summary: Admin creates a new staff account.

nodes.name: Edit Staff
nodes.summary: Admin edits an existing staff account.

nodes.name: Persist Staff
nodes.summary: Staff account data is persisted via the admin staffs API.

nodes.name: News & Disclaimer Management
nodes.summary: Admin publishes news announcements shown to users and manages legal disclaimers presented during booking.

nodes.name: List News
nodes.summary: Admin views the list of published news items.

nodes.name: Create News
nodes.summary: Admin creates a new news announcement.

nodes.name: Edit News
nodes.summary: Admin edits an existing news announcement.

nodes.name: Manage Disclaimers
nodes.summary: Admin manages the disclaimer texts shown during the booking flow.

nodes.name: Persist News
nodes.summary: News content is persisted via the admin news API.

nodes.name: App & Email Settings Management
nodes.summary: Admin configures global application settings and customizes/tests transactional email templates.

nodes.name: View App Settings
nodes.summary: Admin views and edits global application settings.

nodes.name: Manage Email Templates
nodes.summary: Admin views the list of configurable email setting templates.

nodes.name: Edit Email Setting
nodes.summary: Admin edits the content of a specific email template.

nodes.name: Preview Email Template
nodes.summary: Admin previews how the edited email template will render.

nodes.name: Send Preview Email
nodes.summary: Admin sends a test/preview email to verify the template output.

nodes.name: Payment & Billing
nodes.summary: Processes online payments through the GMO payment gateway, manages saved credit cards, handles partial checkouts for extended stays, and produces revenue and OBIC accounting exports for finance.

businessRules: Online bookings cannot be confirmed until GMO payment authorization succeeds
Each tenant has its own GMO merchant settings
Partial checkouts require an existing active booking
OBIC accounting codes must be attached to bookings/tickets for revenue export
crossDomainInteractions: Consumes booking data from Booking & Reservation Management
GMO/revenue settings configured by Admin Facility Management

nodes.name: Online Payment via GMO
nodes.summary: User is redirected to the GMO payment page during online booking; GMO processes the charge and calls back the system with the result.

nodes.name: Redirect To Gmo Payment
nodes.summary: User is redirected to the online payment page to complete the GMO transaction.

nodes.name: Process Payment Gmo Service
nodes.summary: GMO service processes the payment authorization and capture logic.

nodes.name: Handle Gmo Callback
nodes.summary: System handles the asynchronous GMO payment result callback.

nodes.name: Show Payment Success
nodes.summary: System shows the online payment success confirmation page.

nodes.name: Show Payment Failure
nodes.summary: System shows the online payment failure page with retry guidance.

nodes.name: Configure Gmo Settings
nodes.summary: Admin configures per-tenant GMO merchant settings used during payment.

nodes.name: Credit Card Management
nodes.summary: User saves, searches, and deletes credit cards used for online and recurring ticket payments.

nodes.name: Enter Credit Card Info
nodes.summary: User enters credit card details in the booking or profile form.

nodes.name: Save Credit Card
nodes.summary: System saves the credit card via the GMO tokenized card API.

nodes.name: Search Credit Card
nodes.summary: System retrieves the user's saved credit card for reuse.

nodes.name: Delete Credit Card
nodes.summary: User deletes a saved credit card.

nodes.name: Show Deletion Success
nodes.summary: System confirms successful credit card deletion.

nodes.name: Partial Checkout Payment
nodes.summary: User or admin processes an additional partial payment on an existing booking, such as for extended stay charges.

nodes.name: Open Partial Checkout Page
nodes.summary: User opens the partial checkout page for an existing booking.

nodes.name: Submit Partial Checkout
nodes.summary: Partial checkout charge is submitted via the bookings partial-checkout API.

nodes.name: Admin Process Partial Checkout
nodes.summary: Admin processes or reviews a partial checkout on behalf of a customer.

nodes.name: Show Partial Checkout Success
nodes.summary: System confirms the partial checkout payment succeeded.

nodes.name: Revenue & OBIC Accounting Export
nodes.summary: Admin reviews revenue analytics and exports OBIC accounting codes/reports for bookings and tickets for financial reconciliation.

nodes.name: View Revenue Dashboard
nodes.summary: Admin views the revenue management dashboard.

nodes.name: Query Revenue Counts
nodes.summary: System queries aggregate revenue counts for the selected period.

nodes.name: Export Revenue Report
nodes.summary: Admin exports a detailed revenue report.

nodes.name: Backfill Obic Codes
nodes.summary: System backfills missing OBIC accounting codes for existing tickets.

nodes.name: Export Obic Codes
nodes.summary: Admin exports OBIC accounting codes for tickets.

nodes.name: Force Recompute Obic
nodes.summary: Admin forces recomputation of OBIC codes for a specific booking.

nodes.name: POS Check-in & Ticket Scanning
nodes.summary: Handles on-site facility operations: scanning booking barcodes to check customers in/out, tracking booking/vacancy status in real time, and integrating with the Smaregi POS terminal system for payment and inventory sync.

businessRules: A booking can only be checked in once it is confirmed and not already checked in
Smaregi integration is opt-in per tenant and gated by a feature flag
Scan actions can be rolled back if performed in error
crossDomainInteractions: Operates on bookings created by Booking & Reservation Management
Uses ticket/tenant configuration from Admin Facility Management
Calculates and confirms POS payment amounts tied to Payment & Billing

nodes.name: Barcode Check-in / Check-out
nodes.summary: Facility staff scans a customer's booking barcode to check them in or out of the facility, with the ability to roll back mistaken scans.

nodes.name: Open Barcode Scanner
nodes.summary: Staff opens the barcode scanner interface at the facility entrance.

nodes.name: Scan Booking Barcode
nodes.summary: Staff scans a customer's booking barcode to look up the reservation.

nodes.name: Check In Booking
nodes.summary: Booking is marked checked-in at the POS terminal.

nodes.name: Check Out Booking
nodes.summary: Booking is marked checked-out at the POS terminal.

nodes.name: Rollback Scan
nodes.summary: Staff rolls back an erroneous check-in/out scan.

nodes.name: Smaregi POS Integration
nodes.summary: System checks whether Smaregi POS integration is enabled for a tenant, gates related UI, displays Smaregi QR codes on tickets, and calculates POS payment amounts.

nodes.name: Check Smaregi Enabled
nodes.summary: System checks whether Smaregi POS integration is enabled for the current tenant.

nodes.name: Gate Feature Via Hoc
nodes.summary: UI components are gated behind a higher-order component that requires Smaregi to be enabled.

nodes.name: Display Smaregi Qrcode
nodes.summary: System displays a Smaregi QR code on the ticket for POS scanning.

nodes.name: Calculate Pos Payment
nodes.summary: System calculates the payment amount due at the Smaregi POS terminal.

nodes.name: Record Smaregi Scan Status
nodes.summary: Booking record is updated with the Smaregi scan status.

nodes.name: Ticket Scan & Vacancy Status Management
nodes.summary: Admin monitors real-time scan activity and facility vacancy status across bookings from the scan management dashboard.

nodes.name: View Scan Management Dashboard
nodes.summary: Admin views the scan management dashboard for real-time check-in activity.

nodes.name: Update Booking Status
nodes.summary: Admin manually updates a booking's check-in/out status if needed.

nodes.name: Bulk Booking Status
nodes.summary: System retrieves bulk booking status information for the dashboard.

nodes.name: View Vacancies Status Page
nodes.summary: Admin views the facility vacancies status page.

edges.description: Booking flows require an authenticated user session and rely on user account data.
Online and offline bookings trigger GMO payment authorization and credit card charges.
Confirmed bookings are later checked in/out and scanned on-site via POS/Smaregi.
GMO settings and revenue/OBIC reports are configured and reviewed by admins.
Ticket and tenant configuration managed by admins drive POS scan and vacancy validation.
Admin manages staff and user accounts through the shared authentication system.
